SQLLite.SQL: SELECT DISTINCT CO.CO_NUMBER AS "coNumber" , CO.ADMIN_COURT_CODE AS "AdminCourtCode" FROM CONSOLIDATED_ORDERS CO , HEARINGS H WHERE CO.CO_NUMBER = H.CO_NUMBER AND H.HRG_DATE = TO_DATE (${param.hearingDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND CO.ADMIN_COURT_CODE = ${param.adminCourtCode}

Security.roles: viewOnly medium high wcSuper scSuper bmsSuper aeSuper dmSuper edsAdmin cpSuper
